ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software tool */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the software's functionality */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for evaluation */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the software developer or organization */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of software license */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the software */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for installing the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software being evaluated */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity percentage */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity percentage */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy percentage */,
  "mcc" REAL /* Matthew's Correlation Coefficient (MCC) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the software */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the software */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 Score, which is the harmonic mean of precision and recall */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher who conducted the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset files */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to preprocess the dataset before evaluation */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploader_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metrics */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for this evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments made during the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the evaluation was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the evaluation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the browser or client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES software_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES software_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new evaluation, new comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
